top_signals.title: Stocks Pare Losses After Strong Manufacturing Data: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks away from session lows on signs of economic resilience, with traders also parsing remarks from Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Manufacturing Expands for a Sixth Month, Costs Gauge Drops
top_signals.summary: US manufacturing activity expanded for a sixth straight month in June as a war-driven surge in input costs eased.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Video purportedly shows Ukrainian unit running down Russian Shahed. The US is paying attention.
top_signals.summary: An unverified video of Ukrainian unit taking down a Shahed drone with an American-made interceptor comes as the U.S. Army seeks to field drones at scale.
